_publications._publicationTitle: NF106: A Neurofibromatosis Clinical Trials Consortium Phase II Trial of the MEK Inhibitor Mirdametinib (PD-0325901) in Adolescents and Adults With NF1-Related Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: The mean apparent mirdametinib clearance was 7.6 L/h (± 2.6) and showed a good correlation with both body weight and body surface area (R 2  of 0.80 and 0.77, respectively).
details: The mean apparent mirdametinib clearance was 7.6 L/h (± 2.6) and showed a good correlation with both body weight and body surface area (R² of 0.80 and 0.77, respectively)
